data.change_summary: No additional code edits were required in this apply-fixes round. The latest review was approved without amendments, so I left the milestone task-run lineage implementation unchanged and revalidated the existing milestone_record path.
outstanding_risks: Task-run finalization still updates lineage, snapshot, and journal files separately; an interrupted write can leave snapshot or journal state behind `task-runs.ndjson` until a repair or reconciliation pass rebuilds from the lineage file.

steps.description: Reviewed the approved validation output and confirmed there were no follow-up fixes or amendments to apply for bead-to-task run linkage.
Revalidated the existing implementation in the current workspace without making further code changes.
